functions.name: __covenant_policy_reveal

exprs.span: { seller: prev_states[0].seller, bid_commit: prev_states[0].bid_commit, high_bid: bid, high_bidder: prev_states[0].high_bidder, revealed: prev_states[0].revealed + 1, closed: prev_states[0].closed }

data.span: return({ seller: prev_states[0].seller, bid_commit: prev_states[0].bid_commit, high_bid: bid, high_bidder: prev_states[0].high_bidder, revealed: prev_states[0].revealed + 1, closed: prev_states[0].closed });
